message:
feat(3qv04.8.2.2): ABI handle lifecycle contract tests (44 tests)

- tests/wasm_abi_handle_lifecycle_contract.rs: 44 contract tests covering
  handle allocation, lookup, boundary state machine transitions,
  ownership transfer, release/slot recycling, pin/unpin, parent-child
  descendants, leak detection, memory reporting, outcome envelope mapping,
  ABI version compatibility, abort propagation modes, fingerprint
  stability, error code serialization, and recoverability variants
- Fix unused variable in notify.rs (_current_generation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
